titleStmt.title: SII 17.629: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 629. (A.R. No. 583 of 1904.) KAḶḶA-PERUMBŪR, TANJORE TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in the Kailāsanātha temple.

This inscription records the dismissal of the accountant named Śeñalūruḍaiyāṉ Madaḷai Uttamapiriyan, who held a lease in the village, from his post for grāmadrōha and divesting the right of his progeny to that post, by the Peruṅguṟi mahāsabhā of Rājasundari-charuppēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Tañjāvūr-kūṟṟam, in Pāṇḍya kulāśani-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti [śrī .*] tiripuvaṉacakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu pattonpatāvatu nāḷ pāṇṭikulācani vaḷanāṭṭu tañcāvūṟ kūṟṟat
tu piramateyam stirājajūṉtariRead śrīrājasundari.catuppetimaṅkalattu peruṅkuṟi māhāsabhaiyār vyivasthai paṇṇinapaṭi . nammuril kāṇi Uṭai
yanāy kaṇakkeḻuti vaṉta ceñluruṭaiyāṉ mataḷai Uttamapiriyaṉ Ellomukkum meṟk kirāmattorokiyāy kaṇakkeḻutalākā toḻikaiyā
l Ivaṉum Ivaṉ vaṅkiṣattārum Ivaṉ Uṟavumuṟaiyeṉṟu vantu kaṇakkeḻutuvārkaḷā kil tiruvāṇai pūvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyārāṇai .
Digital edition of SII 17.629 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
